colorRules.title: Choose the feature type first
colorRules.body: Start with the feature category you want to recolor, such as CDS, rRNA, tRNA, ncRNA, or repeat_region.

colorRules.title: Choose the qualifier by the identity you want to encode
colorRules.body: Use gene for shared gene symbols, locus_tag for one specific annotated feature, protein_id for one CDS protein, and product for broader functional categories.

colorRules.title: Keep values specific
colorRules.body: Rule values are treated as matching patterns, so broad words can recolor unrelated features. Prefer specific names, anchored patterns, or accessions when possible.

colorRules.title: Set a Legend Caption
colorRules.body: Legend Caption is optional. When provided, it becomes the figure legend label for matching features. Use a concise biological name rather than the raw qualifier value.

colorRules.title: Example rules
colorRules.body: These examples show the feature type, qualifier, value, color, and legend caption fields used by the web app.
